context_bindings.description: Runtime-expression bindings that populate child state-machine context fields.

field_schema.description: Object field declaration with explicit required and nullable semantics.

field_schema_map.description: Object field map whose values declare type, required, and nullable semantics.

object_schema.description: Structured object schema with explicit per-field required and nullable semantics.

runtime_expression.description: Shared runtime reference expression using $root.path.to.field syntax. Context-specific compiler validation restricts allowed roots and field paths.

subject_ref.description: Typed reference to the primary resource under test.

type_expr.description: Structured data type expression. Supports formal primitives, PascalCase model references (the exception to collection-prefixed refs because model ids are type names), data-contract references, arrays, maps, nullable and optional wrappers, enums, and inline object schemas.

type_expr_map.description: Input or payload map whose values are structured type expressions.

feature_tag.description: Unprefixed dotted feature grouping tag; feature tags are labels, not typed references.

description: Sparse, human-authored source product specification. The compiler produces the compiled specification at spec/generated/compiled/spec.yaml, including normalized identifiers, derived events, derived routes, generated references, expanded endpoints, and expanded empty-collection states.
title: Authored Source Product Specification
